title: Fermentation and Extraction of Fungal Cultures
author: Jing Xu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jipckdn

steps.title: Prepared medium as described below:Dextrose Agar(PDA)200g potato20g glucose1000ml seawaterPH=7
steps.instruction: Prepared medium as described below:Dextrose Agar(PDA)200g potato20g glucose1000ml seawaterPH=7.0Czapek’s Aga(CZA)30g sucrose15g agar0.5g KCl1g K2HPO4

steps.title: The fungal strains were cultured on...
steps.instruction: The fungal strains were cultured on Petri dishes of potato dextrose agar (PDA) at 28 °C for 5 days.

steps.title: The agar patches with the title...
steps.instruction: The agar patches with the title fungus were inoculated into Erlenmeyer ﬂasks with four different media.

steps.title: Fungus were adopted for the stationary...
steps.instruction: Fungus were adopted for the stationary fermentation and grown for 40 days at room temperature.

steps.title: The harvested cultures were extracted twice...
steps.instruction: The harvested cultures were extracted twice with an equal volume of EtOAc and evaporated to dryness to get the crude extracts.
